parts.text:
## CLAIMS CODING SUMMARY
**Patient:** Tamera164 Wisozk929 | **DOB:** 1980-02-03 | **Payer:** Blue Cross Blue Shield
**Encounter Date:** 2024-02-18
**Coded by:** Claims AI Agent | **Status:** REQUIRES REVIEW

### Billable Codes
| CPT | Description | Modifier | Status | Evidence |
|-----|-------------|----------|--------|----------|
| 99396 | Periodic comprehensive preventive medicine reevaluation and management of an individual including an age and gender appropriate history, examination, counseling/anticipatory guidance/risk factor reduction interventions, and the ordering of appropriate laboratory/diagnostic procedures, established patient; 40-64 years | | READY TO SUBMIT | "No complaints." and "assessment of health and social care needs (procedure)" |
| 90686 | Influenza virus vaccine, quadrivalent, split virus, preservative free, for intramuscular use | | READY TO SUBMIT | "Patient was given the following immunizations: influenza, seasonal, injectable, preservative free." |
| 90471 | Immunization administration (includes percutaneous, intradermal, subcutaneous, or intramuscular injections); 1 vaccine (single or combination vaccine/toxoid) | | READY TO SUBMIT | Administration of the influenza vaccine. |
| 96127 | Brief emotional/behavioral assessment (eg, depression inventory, attention-deficit hyperactivity disorder scale), with scoring and documentation, per standardized instrument | | REQUIRES REVIEW | "depression screening (procedure)" and "patient health questionnaire 2 item (phq-2) [reported]" |
| 96127 | Brief emotional/behavioral assessment (eg, depression inventory, attention-deficit hyperactivity disorder scale), with scoring and documentation, per standardized instrument | 59 | UNVERIFIED | "depression screening (procedure)" (second instance) and "assessment of substance use (procedure)" and "screening for drug abuse (procedure)" and "drug abuse screening test-10 [dast-10]". Modifier 59 auto-applied per payer rule. |
| 99408 | Alcohol and/or substance (other than tobacco) abuse structured screening (eg, AUDIT, DAST), and brief intervention (eg, FRAMES), 15-30 minutes | | REQUIRES REVIEW | "assessment of substance use (procedure)", "screening for drug abuse (procedure)", and "drug abuse screening test-10 [dast-10]" |

### Hard Stops (Removed from Claim)
None

### Documentation Flags
*   **96127:** Documentation does not reflect comprehensive preventive exam. Clinical note must evidence comprehensive history, physical exam, and counseling/anticipatory guidance.
*   **96127:** No scoring documentation in clinical note. PHQ-2 score must be recorded. Tamera's note lists PHQ-2 [reported] — verify score is captured.
*   **99408:** No validated screening instrument documented (e.g. AUDIT, DAST, CAGE). Clinical note must reference a validated substance abuse screening tool. DAST-10 is sufficient.

### Payer-Specific Notes
*   **CPT 99396:** Modifier 59 is required if depression screening (96127) is billed more than once.
*   **CPT 90686:** Vaccine administration code (90471) not billed alongside 90686. Flag for human review. 90471 (first vaccine admin) must accompany 90686. Without it, reimbursement for administration is lost.
*   **CPT 96127:** Billed more than once on same date without modifier 59 on second unit. Auto-apply modifier 59 to second instance of 96127. Tamera's note documents depression screening x2 — this trigger is expected to fire.
*   **CPT 96127-59:** CPT code 96127-59 is not in the CMS rules database. Currently supported codes: 90471, 90472, 90686, 90714, 96127, 99213, 99214, 99396, 99408, 99420, G2211. Add the code to rules/cms_rules.json to enable denial prediction.
*   **CPT 99408:** No validated screening instrument documented (e.g. AUDIT, DAST, CAGE). Flag for human review. Clinical note must reference a validated substance abuse screening tool. DAST-10 is sufficient.
